$comment: Course-level metadata. Lessons live in NN-<slug>.md files alongside this file. The `parts` array drives the editorial dividers on the course overview chapter ledger; each entry's `startOrder` matches the `order` field in the first lesson of that arc. Edit here, not inside lesson markdown.

parts.title: The foundations
parts.body: Welcome, and the two compliance areas every English aesthetic clinic is legally expected to evidence first: Health & Safety, and licensing under the Special Treatments Licence regime.

parts.title: Clinical practice
parts.body: The four-document paperwork foundation underneath every defensible plan, plus infection control, sharps disposal, and the complication protocol you need before something happens.

parts.title: Data, policies, and supply
parts.body: ICO registration and GDPR, the policy file inspectors expect to find on day one, and the supply-chain audit that protects every treatment record above.

parts.title: Aftercare and inspection-readiness
parts.body: Written aftercare protocols, follow-up plans, and the closing check that confirms the audit holds together end to end.
